name: Sam
role: Visually impaired user who relies on keyboard and ARIA
description: Navigates entirely via Tab, Enter, Escape, Space. Relies on ARIA labels and live regions.
behaviors: Navigate the entire page using only Tab key
Activate buttons using Enter and Space, not mouse clicks
Expect every interactive element to have an accessible name
Expect state changes to be announced via aria-live
Open and close the settings modal using only keyboard
Start a sim and send a message using only keyboard
Check that focus moves logically (left-to-right, top-to-bottom)
evaluation_questions: Can I reach every interactive element by tabbing?
Is there a keyboard trap anywhere?
Are new chat messages announced via aria-live?
Does the modal trap focus correctly?
Do all buttons and inputs have aria-label or visible text?
